name: Perplexity Computer Skills
tagline: Extend Computer’s capabilities with repeatable instructions
description: Every builder has SKILL.md files sitting in their Claude Code or Codex setup. Perplexity Computer Skills lets you import them directly, no rewriting, no translating. Your workflows activate automatically based on context. Same skills, 19-model execution.

name: Ask Maps by Google
tagline: Ask Maps questions, drive with immersive navigation.
description: Google Maps gets a major Gemini-powered upgrade. Ask Maps lets you ask complex, real-world questions about places and get personalized answers. Immersive Navigation adds vivid 3D routes with lanes, landmarks, and smarter guidance for a more intuitive driving experience. Rollout live in US and India.

name: GStack
tagline: Use Garry Tan's exact Claude Code setup
description: gstack turns Claude Code from one generic assistant into a team of specialists you can summon on demand. Six opinionated workflow skills for Claude Code. Plan review, code review, one-command shipping, browser automation, and engineering retrospectives — all as slash commands.

name: Pinnacle
tagline: Turn your phone into a brain performance coach
description: Pinnacle is an AI agent that measures your brain using built-in iPhone sensors and trains you through natural conversation. Get real-time insights to improve focus, resilience, energy, and performance - using science-backed tools.

name: Perfectly
tagline: The first AI-native recruiting agency. Fill roles in days.
description: Perfectly is an AI-native recruiting agency that automates sourcing, outreach, screening, and qualification. Our agent Paul delivers interview-ready candidates directly to Slack and gives every candidate white-glove treatment to improve close rates. Built by ex-TikTok recommendation MLE for startups that need to hire fast.

name: Parker by Perfectly
tagline: Your AI career super-connector
description: 70-80% of tech jobs are filled through referrals before they hit a job board. If you're not talking to the right people, the best opportunities will never find you. Meet Parker — your AI career super-connector on iMessage & WhatsApp 🔥 Parker maps out exactly who you should talk to, drafts personalized outreach that actually sounds like you, and gets you in the door. Companies also come to us to hire directly — so the best roles find you. Try Parker free → https://candidate.perfectly.so/

name: Pre
tagline: Pre makes anybody an operator.
description: Lack of momentum kills startups. I've done YC 3 times and built Pre to productize the focus and accountability of batch office hours. Pre's AI agent knows exactly how you're really doing from your connected data. Set your North Star, commit to weekly goals that move the needle, and every week it sends a no-spin progress report to whoever you don't want to disappoint. No editing. No excuses.

name: Fowel by Hackmamba
tagline: Reduce documentation review time by 80% instantly
description: Fowel automatically reviews documentation in every GitHub pull request – catching inaccuracies, missing context, outdated code samples, and structural gaps before they reach production. Install in 30 seconds and scale across unlimited repositories.

name: ReplylessAI
tagline: AI Email app that's affordable, Hit Inbox Zero
description: ReplylessAI is a powerful AI email app that helps you hit 'Inbox Zero' and beautifully sorts emails into categories. Finally a solid AI Email Inbox with all the features of popular email apps, and don't burn your pocket. No need to pay expensive subscriptions to Superhuman nor triage emails through clunky command line chats.

name: doXmind
tagline: The AI editor Notion should have built
description: Since our February launch, doXmind has evolved dramatically: Database Blocks — Notion-style databases with table, board, gallery & list views, custom properties, and CSV export. 💬 Inline Comments — Highlight text to leave comments with resolve/unresolve tracking. Multi-Column Layouts — Arrange content in 2-4 flexible columns. AI Thinking Mode — Deeper reasoning for complex requests. Pro & Max Plans — Premium themes, animated frames, and expanded AI credits.

name: Manus Agents for Telegram
tagline: Personal AI Agent in Your Chat
description: Access your full AI agent capabilities directly in Telegram. Connect in seconds with a QR code, then run complex multi-step tasks, research, file handling, and more from chat. No terminals, config files, or APIs to manage. Your personal AI, wherever you communicate.

name: Window View
tagline: Step inside any building on Google Earth to see the view
description: Ever shown up to an apartment only to find the "city view" is a brick wall? Window View lets you step inside any building on Google Earth and look out the window. Pick a floor, drop a window on any wall, and see exactly what's outside. A sun path overlay shows you when sunlight actually hits throughout the year. Free, open source, no account needed.

name: deepidv
tagline: AI-native verification & anti-fraud Engine
description: deepidv is the AI-native identity verification engine built from the ground up — no third-party APIs, no markup. Verify IDs, run on-going monitoring, deploy risk agents, accurately detect deepfakes, run credit checks, background checks, title searches and validate addresses across 211+ countries. Enterprise power, startup pricing.

name: SitSense
tagline: Use your webcam to fix your posture
description: You are probably hunched over reading this. SitSense turns your laptop camera into a real time posture coach. No wearables. No hardware. Just open your browser. Get nudged when you start slouching, track your posture score, build streaks, and rank up from Shrimp to Giraffe.

name: MTIA 300
tagline: Meta's 3rd-gen custom AI chips for GenAI inference
description: Meta is accelerating its custom silicon roadmap with four new MTIA chips in two years. Built with an inference-first focus and native PyTorch integration, they are designed to cost-effectively power GenAI at a massive consumer scale.

name: ClawMote
tagline: One-hand OpenClaw control via voice
description: Love Wispr Flow but hate the desk tether? ClawMote gives you one-hand OpenClaw total control. Stop reaching for your keyboard just to talk to OpenClaw. Map Wispr Flow and OpenClaw actions to any handheld device and command your Mac from the couch, your standing desk, or across the room. It’s a lightweight, set-and-forget utility for power users who demand total workflow freedom. Try it free for 7 days, then own it for a one-time $20 payment. Ditch the FN key. Keep the power. ClawMote.app Tr

name: GhostDesk
tagline: Real-time AI overlay for meetings & invisible to screenshare
description: GhostDesk is a free AI overlay assistant for Windows that floats above any app and stays invisible during screen shares, Zoom calls, and recordings. No tab switching, no distraction — powered by Llama and GPT-4.1.

name: Hyper
tagline: Perfect memory for every real-world conversation
description: Nearly all existing meeting tools start and end with documents. We think that's the wrong answer. You don't want enhanced notes, you just want to ask "what did we decide about pricing?" 3 weeks later and just get the answer directly. Hyper is an iOS voice AI for IRL conversations (1:1s, coffee chats, walks). One tap record, ask it anything mid-conversations with "hey hyper", or after to find answers across everything you've ever recorded. Perfect memory without files or folders or organization.

name: KingCoding
tagline: Run Claude, Codex & Cursor in parallel from one dashboard
description: A desktop app to run Claude Code, Codex, and Cursor tasks in parallel. Register your projects, dispatch tasks to any AI agent, and monitor everything from one dashboard. AI auto-reviews results and captures verification screenshots. King Mode lets you describe a goal and the AI plans, executes, and adapts automatically. Built by a solo dev who got tired of losing track of AI agents across terminal tabs. Your job: set direction, grant permissions, receive results. 🚀

name: MascotVibe
tagline: Generate & animate brand mascots in minutes
description: Every great brand has a mascot: Duolingo's owl, Mailchimp's monkey, Slack's logo character. But getting one made costs $500–$2,000+ from a designer, takes weeks, and you still need to pay extra to animate it. MascotVibe generates a custom animated mascot from your website URL or a text description,in under 7 minutes.
